form.formComment: Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from seven starts. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from seven starts. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted entering the first turn and fell as a result.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (30.03) over 520m at this track. Draws an inside box and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (30.03) over 520m at this track. Draws an inside box and is worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the home straight shifted in, raced tightly and came together.
At first turn galloped on heels and lost significant momentum.
Stumbled when exiting the starting boxes and missed the start.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with five minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (36.89) at this track. Aided by a low draw but will need the breaks to go her way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with five minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (36.89) at this track. Aided by a low draw but will need the breaks to go her way.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 11 length sixth over 520m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 11 length sixth over 520m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 365m at this track by 1.75 lengths in a NG. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 365m at this track by 1.75 lengths in a NG. Can make it back to back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the heels midway through the first turn and moved, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing sixth (30.57) at this track last start. Drawn out wide and needs to find best form to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing sixth (30.57) at this track last start. Drawn out wide and needs to find best form to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 365m in 20.81. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at Mix 2/3 level. Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 365m in 20.81. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at Mix 2/3 level. Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on March 24 over 340m at Bulli behind Pocket Talk beaten 13 lengths (19.73) in a NG. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th on March 24 over 340m at Bulli behind Pocket Talk beaten 13 lengths (19.73) in a NG. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at this track. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at this track. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began to concede ground in the turn out of the home straight.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (30.06) in a GR 4/5 at Richmond and returns after a three-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

formComments.title: TAB
